summary: v0.6.22 release candidate is publishable after full local release validation.
findings: Version, notes, task scope, release-candidate routing, package availability, generated recovery artifacts, and the complete heavy prepublish matrix are consistent; the two discovered release blockers have focused and full-suite regression coverage.
evidence_refs: bun run release:prepublish (78/78 release-ci chunks plus coverage and release-critical)
residual_risks: Final npm and tag parity still depends on protected-main merge and the hosted Publish to npm workflow.
